channel.title: Legal — paype.cc
channel.description: paype.cc legal documents — Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Sailor Beware risk disclosure, Compliance framework, and all regulatory notices.

item.title: Acceptable Use Policy - paype.cc
item.description: What you may and may not do with paype.cc — permitted uses, prohibited activities, and consequences of violations.

item.title: API & Developer Terms - paype.cc
item.description: Terms of use for the paype.cc REST API, MCP Server, and Telegram Bot — access, rate limits, prohibited uses, and liability.

item.title: Cardholder Terms - paype.cc
item.description: Terms governing virtual and physical cards issued through paype.cc.

item.title: Compliance - Legal Structure
item.description: How paype.cc is structured - registered MSB under FinCEN, Montana Series LLC, the Whitelabel Partner Series model, and what it means for you.

item.title: Cookie Policy - paype.cc
item.description: Minimal cookies, no third-party tracking. We use only what is strictly necessary.

item.title: Custom Services - paype.cc
item.description: Smart contract deployment, VIP OTC trading, and bespoke payment integrations for business clients.

item.title: Customer Identification Program Notice - paype.cc
item.description: Federal law requires us to verify your identity. This notice explains what we collect and why.

item.title: Data Processing Agreement - paype.cc
item.description: How paype.cc processes personal data on behalf of business clients.

item.title: E-SIGN Consent - paype.cc
item.description: Consent to receive electronic disclosures and communications under the E-SIGN Act.

item.title: Error Resolution - paype.cc
item.description: How to report and resolve transaction errors on your paype.cc account.

item.title: Funds Availability Policy - paype.cc
item.description: When your deposits become available for use in your paype.cc account.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: paype.cc privacy and data protection policy. We collect only what's needed to provide money services and comply with US law.

item.title: Referral Program Terms - paype.cc
item.description: 10% direct + 5% indirect commission on referred user fees. EU/EEA residents excluded.

item.title: Sailor Beware - Risk Disclosure
item.description: paype.cc is an experimental money-services platform. Understand the inherent risks before you sail. Honest disclosure, no fine print.

item.title: Subaccount Terms - paype.cc
item.description: Terms governing subaccount creation, permissions, and fund ownership within paype.cc.

item.title: Terms of Service
item.description: Terms governing the use of paype.cc - a money services platform operated as a Whitelabel Partner Series of CCA.SH Money Services (US) Series LLC.
